backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Tray menu auto-refresh fix + rollback. The OnUpdateAvailable balloon and the 'Check for Updates' click handler have been silently no-oping since 1.8.17 because SynchronizationContext.Current was null inside the tray ctor (NotifyIcon does not trigger the WindowsFormsSyncContext auto-install hook that Form creation does). Result: a freshly-detected update never surfaced as a balloon and the menu never refreshed to show 'Apply update'. Fixed by explicit context install in Program.cs plus defense-in-depth menu rebuild on every right-click via ContextMenuStrip.Opening. Also includes the Phase 2(c) Rollback feature shipped in 1.8.21 (one-deep undo via Setup.ps1 -RollbackFrom). After installing 1.8.22 once manually, all future updates work via the one-click amber 'Apply update' tray item.
